FAQ

Questions before reaching out?

How quickly will someone respond after I fill the form?+
Our team responds within the same business day, Monday to Saturday between 9am and 7pm IST. For enquiries submitted outside working hours, we respond on the next business morning. You can also reach us directly at info@siteflow.com.
What is the free demo — what will I see?+
The demo is a live 10-minute walkthrough of SiteFlow tailored to your type of construction — residential, infrastructure, road, EPC, or interior. You’ll see how site tracking, labour management, cost control, and reporting work for projects like yours. No slides, no generic pitch — actual software, live.
Is there a free trial available?+
We offer a free guided product demo where our team shows you the software live, customised to your type of construction business. Book your free demo and see how SiteFlow works before making any commitment. No credit card required.
Who can use SiteFlow — what types of companies is it for?+
SiteFlow is built for contractors, builders, developers, EPC firms, infrastructure companies, interior companies, and MSMEs in construction. It works across India and the Middle East. If you manage projects, labour, materials, or site costs — SiteFlow is designed for you.
How long does onboarding take?+
Most teams are fully live within a few days. SiteFlow includes free onboarding support — account setup, data import, role configuration, and hands-on training for your team. There’s no long IT implementation or heavy setup required.
What does SiteFlow cost?+
SiteFlow starts at ₹12,000/user/year (billed annually), with a minimum of 3 users. International pricing is available in USD. Plans include Business, Business+, and Enterprise. See the full breakdown on our pricing page or ask during your demo.
